hero.headline: Your sensitive data, protected 24/7
hero.subheadline: The cyber protection service for firms and SMBs. Installed in 15 minutes, continuously monitored.

problem.title: The risk you don't see
problem.intro: Your IT provider manages your computers. But who monitors that no one infiltrates your systems?

card1.title: Ransomware
card1.desc: A program encrypts your client files. Without monitoring, you discover it too late.

card2.title: Data theft
card2.desc: An employee or attacker exfiltrates your sensitive data. Without detection, no one sees it.

card3.title: Non-compliance
card3.desc: The FADP requires protection measures. In case of an audit, are you ready?

solution.title: GWARD watches over you
solution.intro: We monitor your systems 24/7 so you are never the next victim.

promises.title: 6 commitments for your peace of mind

p1.title: Protected in 15 minutes
p1.desc: Download a file, double-click, it's done. No technical skills required.

p2.title: Monitored 24/7, even when you sleep
p2.desc: Our technology continuously analyzes every event. If something abnormal happens at 3 AM, we act.

p3.title: We block, we explain, we recommend
p3.desc: No incomprehensible logs. You receive a clear message: what happened, what we did, what to check.

p4.title: Your security score, every week
p4.desc: A simple number from 0 to 100. You see your progress and receive concrete recommendations.

p5.title: Your data stays secure
p5.desc: Infrastructure hosted in Europe. Your data is protected and never leaves the EU.

p6.title: Compliant before the audit
p6.desc: FADP, GDPR, and ISO 27001 compliance reports generated automatically. The file is ready when the auditor arrives.

socialProof.quote: In 2026, a law firm called us in an emergency. Their server was bombarded by a botnet. We intervened, we blocked, no data lost. That day, we asked ourselves: why wait for the attack to act? We built GWARD to change that.
socialProof.adopted: Already adopted by 50+ firms in Europe

waitlist.title: Early access
waitlist.subtitle: Be among the first to protect your business. Early access members get priority onboarding and exclusive pricing.

form.currentSolution: Do you currently have a cybersecurity solution?
form.success: You're on the list! We'll be in touch soon.
form.reassurance: No commitment. No spam. Just early access.

step1.title: Install the agent
step1.desc: Download and install in 15 minutes on your endpoints. No configuration.

step2.title: We monitor
step2.desc: Our platform analyzes continuously. You see your score and alerts in real time.

step3.title: We protect
step3.desc: Threat detected? We block, we explain, we recommend. You sleep peacefully.

ctaSection.title: Ready to protect your firm?
ctaSection.subtext: Early access now and be among the first to benefit from GWARD protection. Early access, priority onboarding.
